symbol_verify.source: active.theory + active.iDo demos + weDo instruction/hints/starters only
symbol_verify.notes: Null demos T3-A/B T4-A; joins/melt/validate/leakage from demos T1-B T2-A T2-B T4-B and final cutoff demo.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Fallar si la cardinalidad no es 1:1
selfcheck.note: Theory validate one_to_one; demo catches fanout.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Filas del left sin match en right
selfcheck.note: Theory anti-join left_only; demo anti ids.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Reinyecta el agregado al shape original
selfcheck.note: Theory transform reinyecta al shape original.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Incluyes datos posteriores al cutoff en features/métricas del pasado

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left")
print(len(m))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"]})
print(bool(cli["cliente_id"].is_unique))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C001"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="inner")
print(len(m))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002", "C003"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only", "cliente_id"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0]})
try:
    cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", validate="one_to_one")
except Exception:
    print("fail")

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002", "C003"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(int((m["_merge"] == "left_only").sum()))

import pandas as pd
wide = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 2], "a": [10, 20], "b": [1, 2]})
long = wide.melt(id_vars="id", value_vars=["a", "b"])
print(len(long))

import pandas as pd
long = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1, 2, 2], "k": ["a", "b", "a", "b"], "v": [1, 2, 3, 4]})
w = long.pivot_table(index="id", columns="k", values="v", aggfunc="sum").reset_index()
print(w.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
a = pd.DataFrame({"x": [1]})
b = pd.DataFrame({"x": [2]})
print(len(pd.concat([a, b], ignore_index=True)))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame([[1, 2], [3, 4]])
df.columns = pd.MultiIndex.from_tuples([("m", "a"), ("m", "b")])
names = [f"{a}_{b}" for a, b in df.columns]
print(names)
exercises.note: Hints map join; theory flatten post-pivot.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1], "region": ["Lima"]})
expected = {"monto", "region"}
print(set(df.columns) == expected)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1]})
df = df.rename(columns={"a": "monto"})
print(df.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 3.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].sum().to_dict())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 3.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].transform("mean").tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 3.0]})
out = df.groupby("region", as_index=False).agg(total=("monto", "sum"), n=("monto", "count"))
print(out.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, 3.0]).rolling(2).mean()
out = [None if pd.isna(v) else float(v) for v in s.tolist()]
print(out)
exercises.note: Hints rolling 2; first nan as None.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"],
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01", "2024-02-01"]),
})
coh = df.groupby("cliente_id")["fecha"].transform("min").dt.to_period("M").astype(str)
print(dict(zip(df["cliente_id"].unique(), coh.groupby(df["cliente_id"]).first())))

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 3.0, 5.0], index=pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-01-02", "2024-01-03"]))
s = s.sort_index()
print(float(s.rolling(2).mean().iloc[-1]))

parts = [10.0, 20.0, 70.0]
total = 100.0
print(abs(sum(parts) - total) < 1e-9)

pagados = 10
activos = 40
print(pagados / activos)

total = 100
lima = 60
print(total - lima)

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]),
    "monto": [10.0, 999.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
print(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]),
    "monto": [10.0, 999.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
pre = float(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].sum())
total = float(tx["monto"].sum())
print(total - pre)

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"],
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]),
    "monto": [10.0, 999.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
feat = tx[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff].groupby("cliente_id")["monto"].max()
print(feat.to_dict())
